message:
feat(core): EWMA for smoothed metric tracking and anomaly detection (wa-p0yy)

Time-based EWMA with configurable half-life, EwmaWithVariance for
Z-score anomaly detection, and RateEstimator for events/sec from
irregular timestamps. 21 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
